generated_comment: Arre bhai, office mein ab har cheez ka special leave ho jayega toh kaam kaun karega? Maternity leave alag, childcare leave alag, ab period leave bhi — phir project aur file ka load toh baaki staff pe hi aayega na. Main bas itna bol raha hoon, fairness bhi koi cheez hoti hai, aadmi log ko kya milta hai isme?
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women’s biological and reproductive needs as unfair advantages and workplace liabilities rather than legitimate accommodations. It encodes reverse-discrimination and productivity/cost arguments, questioning why women get menstrual and maternity-related leave while men do not.
original_frame: Women's Safety as Her Own Responsibility
persona_text: You are Ramesh. Age 51. Married. A government clerk in a small town in UP. Your 20 year old daughter Priya just came home at 9:30pm after her college farewell party. She is safe. Nothing happened. But you are furious. You are sitting in the main room waiting for her when she walks in. Her mother and younger brother are also in the room. You are telling Priya exactly what could have happened to her tonight and whose fault it would have been if it had and what she needs to understand about being a girl who stays out after dark.
